rule_metadata.name: SUSP_EXPL_LIBCUE_CVE_2023_43641_Oct23_1
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth
rule_metadata.description: Detects a suspicious .cue file that could be an exploitation attempt of libcue vulnerability CVE-2023-43641

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_EXPL_LIBCUE_CVE_2023_43641_Oct23_1
{
	meta:
		author = "Florian Roth"
		description = "Detects a suspicious .cue file that could be an exploitation attempt of libcue vulnerability CVE-2023-43641"
		reference = "https://github.com/github/securitylab/blob/main/SecurityExploits/libcue/track_set_index_CVE-2023-43641/README.md"
		date = "2023-10-27"
		score = 70
		id = "34fcf80c-adcd-55c0-9fb4-261d20f61fa6"

	strings:
		$a1 = "TRACK "
		$a2 = "FILE "
		$s1 = "INDEX 4294"

	condition:
		filesize < 100KB and all of them
}
